I write to you with the weight of a heart that is heavy with the memory of our past. Five years have passed like the sands of time, but the storm is coming and I am not sure if I'll survive it. I am writing to you with the weight of a heart that is heavy with the memory of our past. 

I hope you are well and that the storm is coming and I am not sure if I'll survive it. I am writing to you with the weight of a heart that is heavy with the memory of our past. 

With love and hope,  
Your loving father,  
**Captain Thad**
